title: K-200 Propulsion Interface Control Document
text:
# K-200 Propulsion Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-433-D. Revision: D. Type: ICD. Author: Tobias Wren. Created: 2023-07-13. Last modified: 2023-12-30. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Propulsion subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1168.
